title: Update app title and redesign VTH avatar branding across all pages

requirements.text: Update the main app title from 'VTH: Guest Book' to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' everywhere it appears across the application, including the header in AppLayout.tsx, the AboutDialog.tsx modal, HowToUseDialog.tsx, CreateAccountDialog.tsx, the HTML page title in index.html, and any other component or page that displays the app name.

quotes: Change the main title from "VTH: Guest Book" to "VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker"
do this for each page, such as the About popup modal

acceptanceCriteria: The header in AppLayout.tsx shows 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker'
The AboutDialog.tsx modal title reads 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker'
The HTML <title> tag in index.html reads 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker'
No instance of the old title 'VTH: Guest Book' remains anywhere in the UI
All dialogs (HowToUse, CreateAccount, About) reflect the updated title where applicable

requirements.text: Redesign the VTH avatar/logo to prominently accentuate the 'VTH' initials. The new avatar should make 'VTH' the focal point with bold, legible lettering styled to evoke the outdoors/hiking theme (e.g., rugged serif or bold condensed sans-serif, earthy tones). Replace the existing avatar image with the new generated asset in all locations where the avatar appears, including the header in AppLayout.tsx and the AboutDialog.tsx modal.

quotes: do this for each page, such as the About popup modal

acceptanceCriteria: The new avatar prominently displays 'VTH' as the primary visual element
The avatar is rendered in the sticky header in AppLayout.tsx
The avatar is rendered inside the AboutDialog.tsx modal
The avatar uses the new generated image asset from frontend/public/assets/generated
The avatar style is consistent across all locations it appears

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts) or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not alter the backend schema or Motoko logic
Do not change the color palette defined in frontend/src/index.css or tailwind.config.js
nonGoals: Changing navigation routes or page structure
Modifying backend data models or guestbook logic
Redesigning layout or overall visual theme beyond the avatar and title

required: Bold outdoor-themed logo badge with large stylized 'VTH' initials in rugged condensed lettering, earthy green and brown tones, mountain silhouette or trail motif in the background (vth-avatar.dim_256x256.png)
